5059c02c: Each article can include a Front Matter section (in YAML format) at the beginning to provide metadata that the theme may require, such as: title, date, tags, description, author, cover image, sticky post, menu, etc. Meow~
c22d1df1: - `date`: Article date, used for sorting/display (recommended to fill in, suggested format `YYYY-MM-DD` meow)
b847c04d: - `desc`: Summary (optional, adding it will make the homepage look better meow)
f24be3e9: - `sticky`: Sticky priority (optional, higher numbers take precedence)
f56f66d3: - `menu`: Bind menu (optional, to display a specific menu for this article)
145d97f2:
1. `sticky` from large to small (treat no sticky as 0 meow)
2. `date` from new to old
6d0c0b51:
## Field Description (Recommended Conventions)
| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **`title`** | string | Article title |
| **`date`** | string | Article date (format suggested `YYYY-MM-DD`) |
| **`tags`** | string[] | Tags array |
| **`desc`** | string | Summary |
| **`author`** | string | Author name |
| **`coverSrc`** | string | Cover/background image URL |
| **`sticky`** | number | Sticky priority |
| **`menu`** | string | Bound menu key |
f20617f9:
1. **`sticky`** from large to small (treat no sticky as 0 meow)
2. **`date`** from new to old

656ca1f8:
## Field Description (Recommended Conventions)
| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **title** | string | Article Title |
| **date** | string | Article Date (Format suggested YYYY-MM-DD) |
| **tags** | string[] | Tags Array |
| **desc** | string | Summary |
| **author** | string | Author Name |
| **coverSrc** | string | Cover/Background Image URL |
| **sticky** | number | Sticky Priority |
| **menu** | string | Bind Menu Key |
d098603a: Each article can include a **Front Matter** (in YAML format) at the beginning, used to provide metadata for the article, such as: title, date, tags, description, author, cover image, pinning, menu, etc.
1619fb92: Front Matter is a YAML-formatted metadata block located at the beginning of a Markdown file, delimited by `---`. Kecare parses this metadata and passes it to theme components for use.
b6783775: Here is an example of Front Matter containing all commonly used fields:
16f0856c: If you just want to get started quickly, a minimal Front Matter only requires:
214ed986: Other fields will use default values, you can come back to fill them in at any time.
45c4a943:
```yaml
---
title: Writing Guide                 # Article title
date: 2025-11-19               # Publication date
tags:                          # Tag list
  - kecare
  - blog
  - tutorial
desc: This is a guide on how to write using Kecare  # Article summary
author: Author Name                 # Author name
coverSrc: "https://example.com/cover.webp"  # Cover image
sticky: 1                      # Sticky priority
menu: kecare-docs              # Belonging menu
translate: ['zh-CN', 'en-US', 'ja-JP']  # Translation languages, the first value is recommended to be the current language
---
a8931115:
```yaml
---
title: Writing Guide                 # Article title
date: 2025-11-19               # Publication date
tags:                          # Tag list
  - kecare
  - blog
  - tutorial
desc: This is a guide on how to write using Kecare  # Article summary
author: Author Name                 # Author name
coverSrc: "https://example.com/cover.webp"  # Cover image
sticky: 1                      # Sticky priority
menu: kecare-docs              # Belonging menu
translate: ['zh-CN', 'en-US', 'ja-JP']  # Translation languages, the first value must be the current language
---
